mapper.select: SELECT id, product_id, included_items, excluded_items, guide_name, guide_phone, meeting_location, meeting_time, notes, insurance_info, emergency_contact, passport_visa_info, other_notices, age_adult, age_child, age_infant, terms, reservation_notes, entry_regulations, surcharge_info, created_at, updated_at FROM cruise_details WHERE product_id = #{productId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cruise_details ( product_id, included_items, excluded_items, guide_name, guide_phone, meeting_location, meeting_time, notes, insurance_info, emergency_contact, passport_visa_info, other_notices, age_adult, age_child, age_infant, terms, reservation_notes, entry_regulations, surcharge_info, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{productId}, #{includedItems}, #{excludedItems}, #{guideName}, #{guidePhone}, #{meetingLocation}, #{meetingTime}, #{notes}, #{insuranceInfo}, #{emergencyContact}, #{passportVisaInfo}, #{otherNotices}, #{ageAdult}, #{ageChild}, #{ageInfant}, #{terms}, #{reservationNotes}, #{entryRegulations}, #{surchargeInfo}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE cruise_details SET included_items = #{includedItems}, excluded_items = #{excludedItems}, guide_name = #{guideName}, guide_phone = #{guidePhone}, meeting_location = #{meetingLocation}, meeting_time = #{meetingTime}, notes = #{notes}, insurance_info = #{insuranceInfo}, emergency_contact = #{emergencyContact}, passport_visa_info = #{passportVisaInfo}, other_notices = #{otherNotices}, age_adult = #{ageAdult}, age_child = #{ageChild}, age_infant = #{ageInfant}, terms = #{terms}, reservation_notes = #{reservationNotes}, entry_regulations = #{entryRegulations}, surcharge_info = #{surchargeInfo}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE product_id = #{productId}
